note: Implementation status of planned API v2 capabilities versus current live edge function support. 'live' here means every edge function the feature depends on is deployed AND called by current src/ code, per mcp__supabase__list_edge_functions cross-referenced against api-inventory.json. A feature needing two functions where only one is deployed is NOT live end to end, even if the deployed half works.

features.notes: The v2 client foundation exists in src/api/v2 and supabase/functions/_shared/v2, but no scena-api router is deployed yet. api-inventory.json's 12 planned paths are an unreviewed proposal, not a ratified contract — see its pathsCaveat.
Access to current active Team is planned for the v2 router via manager JWT.
CORRECTED (was folded into 'Display registration and pairing' as live:true). screen-register is source_created only, not deployed. A kiosk cannot currently self-register in production.

screen-claim is deployed and live. It has nothing to claim, however, without a screen row created by screen-register (not deployed) — so this capability is live in isolation but not reachable end to end. See docs/sop/Purpose.md §12 Stage 8.
Kiosk polling is implemented as a standalone gateway endpoint that resolves display state on every poll. Deployed and called by src/lib/display.ts.
CORRECTED (was live:true). screen-credential-rotate is source_created only, not deployed. Managers cannot currently rotate a display credential in production.
presentation-upload is deployed and live. Split out from 'Presentation ingestion' — see the callback capability below, which is not live.

CORRECTED. presentation-callback is source_created only, not deployed. An upload job can be created but its LXC processing result cannot currently be reported back, so no upload can reach 'ready' status through the live path today.
CORRECTED (was live:true). automations-run is source_created only, not deployed. display_automations rows can be created but nothing deployed currently executes them.
Stripe Checkout session creation is implemented in a live edge function. Not yet click-tested end to end per docs/API_V2_PROGRESS.md and docs/sop/Purpose.md §5.
Billing portal session creation is implemented in a live edge function.
Stripe events are ingested, deduplicated, and used to sync subscription state via finalize_paid_team_subscription / sync_paid_team_subscription.

Not an edge function — uses Supabase Auth directly. Replaced the legacy MJCC SSO exchange per API_V2_PROGRESS.md Session 1 Phase 1. OAuth-initiation leg was browser-verified; the post-consent callback leg was only unit-tested, not click-tested, per that same ledger entry.

Deployment status: deployed (v9, ACTIVE). Frontend reference status: no active reference found. Runtime status: deprecated behavior confirmed at the currently deployed version (re-verified via get_logs this session — v9 returned OPTIONS 404; a prior claim of 'returns 410 Gone' was sourced from a superseded version-4 deployment's older logs and has been corrected — see api-inventory.json for the full timestamped detail). Superseded by native authentication above. Deletion is a tracked, deferred cleanup item, not yet done.
Both live functions and planned v2 use the same stable error code catalog (src/shared/errors.ts, supabase/functions/_shared/errors.ts).
Idempotency client headers are supported in src/api/v2, but no server-side idempotency_keys table or store exists yet. The DDL is drafted (see docs/API_V2.md) but not applied.

docs/sop/Purpose.md requires audit events be recorded for Team deletion and other sensitive actions. No audit_events table exists in the live schema (verified via mcp__supabase__list_tables). supabase/functions/_shared/v2/audit.ts exists as shape-only scaffolding, explicitly not wired to any table.
Realtime broadcast invalidation is a live implementation detail used by kiosk polling. Not an edge-function deployment question — wired directly into src/domain/*.ts mutations and Supabase Realtime.
